title: "I Laid Me Down And Slept" Psalm 3:5-6

notes.introduction: An exposition of Psalm 3:5-6 on the rest and peace David experienced after prayer during Absalom's rebellion, the third in a series through Psalm 3. Draws on Philippians 4:6-7, Psalm 27, Psalm 56, Psalm 118, Isaiah 26:3-4, and Hebrews 13:5-6 to examine the relationship between trust in God and freedom from worry.

sections.heading: Worry Versus Leaving Burdens with God
